Describe the main mechanical assembly and its visible components.
canonical_answer: A black industrial engine block serves as the central subject, featuring silver metallic pipes curving from the top left. A white cylindrical air filter housing sits prominently on the upper center section. Red and white rectangular stickers with numerical text adhere to the side casing. The assembly rests on a light-colored wooden pallet or brown surface.

question: Describe the visual details of the engine casing and surrounding area.
canonical_answer: Black rectangular housing components display red labels with white text numbers like 220 or 228. Silver curved exhaust or intake piping extends upwards from the engine block. A small metal tool lies on the concrete floor near scattered dry leaves. A white plastic bottle is visible on the left side near the machinery.
